name: Indian Lamb & Spinach,v1
recipeIngredient: 1 pound frozen spinach, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cube the lamb and remove all visible fat.
2. Cut spinach into 1/4-inch strips.
3. In a large non-stick skillet, heat oil and sauté onion until softened.
Add lamb, turmeric, coriander, ginger, and ground cumin.
Simmer, stirring frequently, for 10 minutes until meat is browned.
4. Stir in spinach, yogurt, thyme, and mustard.
Cover and simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. If necessary, add water (only).
Simmer for an additional 15 minutes until meat is tender.
